subparts.text: Write the purpose of the following in a ‘Fire Safety Door’ Intumescent strip Self-closing spring mechanism 2.5
What is ‘Piston Effect’ in high-rise elevator systems? Write a short note on how to address this issue in design of high-rise elevators? 2.5
What is a Paternoster Parking System? 2.5
Write full forms for these abbreviations: LPG CNG LNG GHG BOD 2.5
What is ‘Source Segregation’ in Solid Waste Management? Mention the recommended colour coding as per The Solid Waste Management Rules, 2016 by MoEFCC 2.5

Fill in the blanks: BOD is a measure of the level of pollution due to _____ pollutants Full form of DEWATS is _______ A BOD to COD ratio close to 1 implies _____ biodegradability of the pollutants in a given sewage sample 2.5
What are the two types of ‘Field Devices’ used in Building Automation System? Write a short note on these two types. 2.5
Write full forms for these abbreviations: ECBC HVAC BEE TR EER 2.5

questions.question_text: Mention any FOUR important guidelines/standards for design of ‘Refuge Area’ in High-rise buildings. A high-rise building has a height of 45 meters with 3 meter floor-to-floor height. The floor area on each floor is uniform throughout the building and is equal to 1000 m² at each floor. List down the minimum required refuge areas and all their corresponding floor levels. Consider relevant guidelines as per NBC 2016.
Write the definitions of the following and mention their respective measurement
Write a brief note on any FIVE types of Automated Parking Systems explaining their main features/functions.

Answer the following questions in around FOUR lines each: What is Biogas and mention few suitable raw materials for Biogas production. Which process is used in Biogas production ? Write the definition of the process. Mention the major gases released during Biogas production Is Biogas Renewable/Non-renewable source of energy. Give two examples for each – renewable & non-renewable energy sources.
What are the 3Rs in Solid Waste Management ? Describe the sequence of steps in ‘Solid Waste Management’ from ‘Source Segregation’ to ‘Disposal & Landfills’.

Fill in the blanks: Ideal cross-section shape for combines sewers is _______ Tricking filters used in wastewater treatment is _______ process Septic Tank is an example for _____ treatment process Imhoff Tank is an example for _____ treatment process UASB reactor in wastewater treatment is ______ process Velocity in a sewer should be ______ than self-cleansing velocity Describe the sequence of steps in ‘Wastewater Treatment’ from ‘Screening’ to ‘Digestion of Sewage Sludge’.
Explain in detail what is Integrated Building Management system?
Explain what is ‘Building Energy Analysis’? Mention any TWO BEE Approved Compliance Software used for Daylighting Analysis
